name: ssh-exec
description: Remote command execution and sshfs mounting over OpenSSH

interface.shortDescription: Run remote commands and mount remote files over OpenSSH.
interface.longDescription: SSH Exec provides two tools: ssh_mount for mounting a remote host locally so Codex can use built-in file tools, and ssh_exec for remote commands such as inspection, verification, and service control.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use ssh_mount before editing remote files, then use ssh_exec to inspect or verify the remote host.
